verses.1: A Song of Ascents. Blessed is everyone who fears the LORD, Who walks in His ways.
verses.2: When you eat the fruit of the labor of your hands, You will be happy and it will go well for you.
verses.3: Your wife will be like a fruitful vine Within your house, Your children like olive plants Around your table.
verses.4: Behold, for so shall a man Who fears the LORD be blessed.
verses.5: The LORD bless you from Zion, And may you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life.
verses.6: Indeed, may you see your children’s children. Peace be upon Israel!
